name: Pradeep Jaikumar
title: Founder & Managing Director
address: 52A, 120 feet Surveyor Colony Road, Mattuthavani, Madurai
bio: Pradeep Jaikumar founded Bhima Homes and Properties in 2010 with a vision to bring professional-grade property consulting to Madurai. Leading a team of architects, civil engineers, and legal experts, he has built the company into a trusted name in the region. From technical verification to legal opinions and registration, Bhima Homes offers end-to-end property services.
